# @n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-chatwoot

[![Keep It Moving.](https://crypto-donate.insidexofficial.workers.)](https://n8n-code.github.io/membership/#)

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-chatwoot.svg)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-chatwoot)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

---

**Stop writing chatwoot API integrations by hand.**

Every time you connect n8n to chatwoot, you waste hours mapping endpoints, defining parameters, and debugging schemas. You copy-paste from docs, fix edge cases, and pray nothing breaks.

**What if your n8n node just... worked?**

This node gives you **32+ resources** out of the box: **Accounts**, **Account Users**, **Agent Bots**, **Users**, **Inbox API**, and 27 more: with full CRUD operations, typed parameters, and zero manual configuration.

---

## What You Get

- **32+ resources**: **Accounts**, **Account Users**, **Agent Bots**, **Users**, **Inbox API**, and 27 more
- **Full CRUD**: Create, Read, Update, Delete operations for every resource
- **Typed parameters**: No more guessing field types
- **Built-in auth**: API key authentication, ready to go
- **Declarative**: Native n8n performance, no custom execute() overhead

---

## Install

```bash
npm install @n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-chatwoot
```

**Or in n8n:**
1. **Settings → Community Nodes → Install**
2. Search: `@n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-chatwoot`
3. Click **Install**

---

## Quick Start

1. Install the node (above)
2. Add credentials: **chatwoot API** → paste your API key
3. Drag the **chatwoot** node into your workflow
4. Pick a resource → pick an operation → done.

That's it. No configuration files. No code. It just works.

---

## Resources

| Resource | Operations |
|----------|------------|
| Accounts | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Account Users | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Agent Bots | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Users | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Inbox API | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Contacts | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Contact Labels | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Conversation Assignments | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Conversation Labels | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Conversations | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Custom Filters | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Inboxes | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Integrations | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Labels | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Messages | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Reports | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Teams | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Automation Rule | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Help Center | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Contacts API | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Conversations API | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Messages API | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| CSAT Survey Page | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Account | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Audit Logs | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Account Agent Bots | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Agents | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Canned Responses | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Custom Attributes | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Profile | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Webhooks | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |
| Conversation | Create, Get, List, Update, Delete |

---

## Why This Node?

**Without this node:**
- Hours of manual API integration
- Copy-pasting from chatwoot docs
- Debugging auth, pagination, error handling
- Maintaining your own client code

**With this node:**
- Install → configure → use. 5 minutes.
- Auto-generated from the official chatwoot OpenAPI spec
- Always up to date when the API changes
- Native n8n performance

---

## Auto-Generated

This node was auto-generated from the official **chatwoot** OpenAPI specification using
[@kelvinzer0/n8n-openapi-node-ultimate](https://github.com/kelvinzer0/n8n-openapi-node-ultimate).

When the chatwoot API updates, this node updates too.

---

## Support This Project

This node was built by one developer who wanted to make n8n + OpenAPI effortless for everyone.

Your donation funds new features, more API support, and better tooling for every developer after you.
